title: Managed audit manual sandbox connection credential resolver credential handle approval contract upstream echo verification

credentialHandleApprovalContract.sourceSpan: Node v316 closure review + Node v313 catalog
credentialHandleApprovalContract.purpose: Define the non-secret credential handle approval shape required before any later resolver can discuss sandbox credential lookup.

requiredFields.label: Credential handle
requiredFields.purpose: Identify which credential handle was reviewed without exposing the resolved credential value.

requiredFields.label: Approval correlation id
requiredFields.purpose: Bind the handle review to the signed approval chain.

requiredFields.label: Operator identity handle
requiredFields.acceptedShape: operator identity handle, no credential value
requiredFields.purpose: Identify the requesting operator without embedding secret material.

requiredFields.label: Reviewer identity handle
requiredFields.acceptedShape: reviewer identity handle, no private key
requiredFields.purpose: Identify the human reviewer without carrying credentials or signing keys.

requiredFields.label: Policy version
requiredFields.purpose: Bind the handle approval to a known review policy contract.

requiredFields.label: Approval status
requiredFields.purpose: Keep this version contract-only and status-based.

requiredFields.label: Issued at
requiredFields.purpose: Declare when the credential handle approval was issued.

requiredFields.label: Expires at
requiredFields.purpose: Prevent stale handle approvals from being treated as current.

requiredFields.label: Revocation marker
requiredFields.acceptedShape: boolean marker plus optional evidence handle
requiredFields.purpose: Make revocation explicit without reading any secret provider state.

requiredFields.label: Audit digest
requiredFields.acceptedShape: sha256 digest or equivalent stable digest
requiredFields.purpose: Prove contract immutability without embedding raw credential or endpoint material.

prohibitedFields.reason: Credential values must not enter the handle approval contract.
Endpoint material remains handle/allowlist-only and belongs to a later prerequisite.
Provider configuration would turn this contract into implementation.
Resolver client configuration is not allowed in a contract-only intake.
Runtime bindings for providers or clients remain out of scope.
No HTTP/TCP payload may be prepared or sent by v317.
Approval ledger writes remain outside this Node contract.
Schema migration SQL is prohibited in this intake.

rejectionReasons.message: The credential handle approval contract fields are missing.
Credential values are not allowed; only handles and review statuses are allowed.
Raw endpoint URLs are not allowed; endpoint allowlist approval is a separate prerequisite.
Secret provider and resolver client config are prohibited in this intake.
Ledger writes, schema migration, deployment, and rollback execution are prohibited.

noGoBoundaries.message: v317 must not read managed audit credential values.
v317 must not parse or render raw endpoint URLs.
v317 must not instantiate secret providers.
v317 must not instantiate resolver clients.
v317 must not send HTTP/TCP requests.
v317 must not write approval ledger or schema state.
v317 must not automatically start Java, mini-kv, or external audit services.
v317 must not implement a runtime shell.
v317 must not invoke a runtime shell.

upstreamEchoRequests.requestedEcho: Read-only echo of the Node v317 credential-handle approval contract.
Non-participation receipt proving mini-kv does not store, validate, resolve, or become authority for credential handles.

echoVerification.sourceSpan: Node v317 + Java v146 + mini-kv v139

warnings.message: v318 proves Java v146 and mini-kv v139 echoed the Node v317 credential handle contract; it does not approve or implement a runtime shell.

recommendations.message: The next Node step may define how a human-supplied approval credential handle is reviewed, but must still reject credential values and raw endpoint URLs.
Do not convert upstream echo alignment into implementation permission; require a separate credential handle review packet and explicit approval gates.

nextActions: Archive Node v318 as the read-only verification that Java v146 and mini-kv v139 echoed the Node v317 credential handle approval contract.
Keep disabled runtime shell implementation and invocation blocked after v318; this version only proves the credential handle contract was echoed upstream.
The next plan should review whether credential-handle-approval can move from contract-intake-defined to upstream-echo-complete before any next prerequisite starts.
